_meta.description: Manual curation layer applied AFTER scripts/update_wl_stations.py and BEFORE the validator gate in scripts/update_all_stations.py. Each entry targets a specific upstream-data defect that is not fixable by tweaking the merge logic (the WL OGD source itself carries the bad value). The schema is intentionally narrow — three operation types only ('restore' / 'patch_coords' / 'remove') — so a malicious or careless override cannot reshape the directory beyond its declared blast radius. Apply via scripts/apply_station_overrides.py (idempotent).

overrides.reason: Bad Fischau (eva 8100655) and Bad Fischau-Brunn (eva 8100653) were both enriched to Bad Fischau-Brunn's position (47.826685, 16.173239), so two distinct manual_distant_at OEBB stations shared one coordinate (geographic-duplicate validator finding, distance 0). Re-points Bad Fischau to its authoritative OEBB Geo-Netz coordinate (data/oebb_geonetz_stops.json, bsts_id 442); the two stations are ~490 m apart in reality. Bad Fischau-Brunn is left untouched (already within the 150 m inertia tolerance of its Geo-Netz position).
overrides.expires_when: The enrichment assigns eva 8100655 (Bad Fischau) its own coordinate distinct from eva 8100653, e.g. by reconciling manual_distant_at entries against oebb_geonetz by eva_nr.

overrides.reason: Wiener Linien retired all haltepunkte for DIVA 60200558 (Wien Unter St. Veit, Hummelgasse) but the station itself stays in haltestellen.csv. The WL build step skips DIVAs without haltepunkte, so the station drops from stations.json each cron tick. Restored from PR #1537 (the merge commit f755e8a snapshot).
overrides.expires_when: Wiener Linien re-adds at least one haltepunkt for DIVA 60200558 in data/wienerlinien-ogd-haltepunkte.csv

overrides.reason: Wiener Linien OGD lists DIVA 60201955 (Wien Halblehenweg) at (48.723579, 15.067882) — geographically northern Lower Austria, not Vienna. The actual Halblehenweg street is in the 22nd district (Donaustadt, Hirschstetten). Coordinates verified against neighbouring WL stops (Bibernellweg, Kapellergasse, Kalmusweg) and confirmed by the is_in_vienna polygon check.
overrides.expires_when: Wiener Linien fixes the coordinates in data/wienerlinien-ogd-haltestellen.csv (currently lat=48.7235788, lon=15.0677477) and data/wienerlinien-ogd-haltepunkte.csv (StopIDs 3973/3974 at the same wrong coordinates)

overrides.reason: Wiener Linien OGD lists DIVA 60201954 (Wien Leopoldine-Padaurek-Straße) at (48.403671, 15.386479) — northwest of Vienna in Lower Austria. The actual street is in the 21st district (Floridsdorf), near Siemensstraße. Coordinates verified against neighbouring WL stops (Edelsteingasse, Heinrich-von-Buol-Gasse, Töllergasse) and confirmed by the is_in_vienna polygon check.
overrides.expires_when: Wiener Linien fixes the coordinates in data/wienerlinien-ogd-haltestellen.csv (currently lat=48.4036711, lon=15.3863442) and data/wienerlinien-ogd-haltepunkte.csv (StopIDs 5082/5083 at the same wrong coordinates)

overrides.reason: Wien Sofienalpenstraße, Roßkopfgasse (DIVA 60251359) shares the exact haltepunkte coordinates (48.2471756, 16.2189477) with Wien Roßkopfgasse (DIVA 60251355) — both DIVAs are in haltestellen.csv (with different official coordinates) but their haltepunkte all collapse to the same point. Keep the simpler-named modern entry (DIVA 60251355, newer haltepunkt id 8216); drop the legacy intersection-name variant (DIVA 60251359, older haltepunkt ids 3921/3922).
overrides.expires_when: Wiener Linien retires DIVA 60251359 from haltestellen.csv OR moves its haltepunkte to the genuine intersection location, ~150 m southwest of DIVA 60251355

overrides.reason: The build re-creates a standalone oebb_geonetz Betriebsstelle record 'Handelskai' (bst_code 'Nw  H2', no wl_diva) each run; it duplicates the canonical 'Wien Handelskai' Verkehrsstation by eva_nr 8101934 and is a pure subset (same eva_nr/ifopt_id/address — the canonical entry additionally carries wl_diva 60201705, vor_id and WL stops). The duplicate trips the eva_nr identity-conflict gate (validate_stations.py exits 1) and makes the bare 'Handelskai' lookup resolve to the impoverished record. Keyed on bst_code because the record has no wl_diva and its eva_nr is shared with the canonical entry; removes every match so a regenerated copy cannot survive into the validator.
overrides.expires_when: The build no longer emits a standalone oebb_geonetz 'Handelskai' (bst_code 'Nw  H2') record separate from the canonical 'Wien Handelskai' — e.g. the GeoNetz/OSM merge reconciles Betriebsstellen against the Verkehrsstation by eva_nr.
